description: A web application for personalized meal planning that partners with certified nutritionists.

file_structure.app.py: Main application file containing routes and controllers.
file_structure.templates/index.html: Home page of the web app.
file_structure.templates/dashboard.html: User dashboard where meal plans are displayed.
file_structure.static/style.css: CSS styles for the web app.
file_structure.static/app.js: JavaScript for interactivity in the web app.

demo_data: A few demo meal plans for initial display on the app.
